docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,100.00 FILED BY AMONSON, MATTHEW AS TO DEFENDANT MASSEI, DEBORAH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-29-2000 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PLAINTIFF DID NOT PAY $20.00 FILING FEE. WE CALL HE WILL MAIL CHECK BY MAIL.
CHECK OF $20. POSTED FOR FILING FEE.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-29-2000, CONTINUED BY COURT TO NOV-03-2000 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PARTIES SETTLED. IF THERE ARE NO APPEARANCES ON 11/3/00 AT 10:00 AM, THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMONSON, MATTHEW RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MASSEI, DEBORAH $200.00 PRINCIPAL, $48.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $248.00, THIS JUDGMENT IS FOR BALANCE DUE AFTER CREDITS FOR PREVIOUS PAYMENTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MASSEI, DEBORAH
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $283.16 AS TO DEFENDANT MASSEI, DEBORAH
